item.title: [BHS8][Infrastructure] - Rack BHS0816B04C maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 20, 20:00 UTC  -  Aug 21, 04:00 UTC

Jul 9, 18:57 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Start time : 20/08/2026 20:00 UTC
End time : 21/08/2026 04:00 UTC
Service impact : Customers could still experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case of their servers.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [BHS8][Infrastructure] - Rack BHS0817A01A maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 13, 02:00 - 14:00 UTC

Jul 9, 20:50 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Start time : 13/08/2026 02:00 UTC
End time : 13/08/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : During the maintenance window, the servers in the specified rack will be gracefully shut down to allow the maintenance activities to be performed safely. As a result, the services hosted on these servers will be unavailable before being restored once the maintenance is complete.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [US][Network Services] - OVHcloud Load Balancer Maintenance Notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 11, 09:00 - 13:00 UTC

Jul 3, 14:42 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our Load Balancing offering in the US region.

Start time : 11/08/2026 09:00 UTC
End time : 11/08/2026 13:00 UTC
Service impact : Customers may experience brief periods of degraded performance during the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Load Balancing infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [WAW1][Cooling System] - Rack WAW0106B04C maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 6, 06:00 - 14:00 UTC

Jul 7, 03:39 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 06/08/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 06/08/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the cooling system's efficiency may be temporarily reduced for some servers, potentially lowering performance. Despite ongoing mitigation efforts, customers could still experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Infrastructure] - Network Core maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 5, 07:00 - 12:00 UTC

Jul 9, 14:50 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Network Core infrastructure.

Start time : 05/08/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 05/08/2026 12:00 UTC
Service impact : None
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Network Core infrastructure to enhance the security of our network infrastructure and to provide better protection for your services.
Configuration of Additional IPs and associated Virtual MAC addresses on your server may not match exactly what is listed in your OVHcloud customer portal.
In order to avoid any impact on your services, we recommend that you check and update your configuration as needed before 08/04/2026. If you were previously notified of a different date, the 08/04/2026 deadline supersedes it.

How to proceed:

1) Log in to your OVHcloud customer portal.
2) Go to the Network section, then IP.
3) Select your nsXXXX server using the filter.
4) Verify that the listed IP addresses and virtual MAC addresses match those configured on your server.
5) If the listed IP and virtual MAC addresses do not match your server configuration, please update them accordingly on your server.

If you have any questions or need help with this verification, our support team is ready to assist you.

Thank you for your understanding.
